influencers.name: nsitharaman

posts.caption:
Addressed and interacted with Board Members of US-India Strategic Partnership Forum (@usispforum).

Outlined the key tenets of the Union Budget 2026–27 and shared that, under the leadership of Hon'ble Prime Minister Shri @narendramodi, the Budget reflects the Government’s commitment to continuity, certainty, and predictability in policy, enabling businesses and industry to foster long-term plans and investment commitments.

#viksitbharatbudget
People should have faith in Hon'ble PM Shri @narendramodi's vision for India's future.
Animation, Visual Effects, Gaming, and Comics (AVGC) sector has taken centre stage in Union Budget 2026-27 & it'll prove to be transformational for India's next-gen. #viksitbharatbudget
Youth Dialogue on Union Budget 2026-27 has proven to be an enriching experience for students from across the nation. #viksitbharatbudget
Modi Government prioritises national security & #operationsindoor is a perfect example of this. #viksitbharatbudget
Yuva Shakti has the capacity to take India to new heights & Union Budget 2026-27 further strengthens their role in nation-building. #ViksitBharatBudget

Interacted with college students from different regions of the country, after the presentation of the Union Budget 2026-27.

The students, earlier in the day, witnessed live presentation of the Union Budget from the Lok Sabha Gallery.

The interaction signifies that the government led by Hon'ble Prime Minister Shri @narendramodi places importance to the ambitions and voice of our youth. #ViksitBharatBudget

Met Mr. Ajay Banga, President - World Bank Group, in New Delhi, today.

Discussed ways to deepen India–World Bank cooperation in support of India’s long-term development vision of #ViksitBharat.
77th Republic Day celebrations at residence in New Delhi. #RepublicDay2026

Unfurled the National Flag and celebrated the #77thRepublicDay at residence in New Delhi.

#RepublicDay2026
Chaired the meeting on Pre-Budget Consultation with States and Union Territories (with Legislature) for the forthcoming Union Budget 2026-27, in New Delhi, today.
Young minds from the Delhi School of Economics (DSE), University of Delhi, shared their ideas for the upcoming Union Budget 2026–27.

influencers.biography: Account run by the Office of Smt Nirmala Sitharaman, Minister of Finance & Corporate Affairs, Govt of India | MP (RS) representing Karnataka
